name: fix-todos-fanout
description: Plan TODO fixes as JSON, fan out one worker per file, then summarize the results.
task: Fix all TODO comments in the repository.

chain.label: Plan
chain.task: For {task}: output ONLY a JSON object of the form {"files":[{"path":"...","note":"..."}]} listing every file containing TODO comments.

parallel.task: Fix the TODO comments in {file.path}. Planner note: {file.note}. Full item: {item}

chain.label: Summarize
chain.task: Summarize these fix reports for the original task ({task}): {outputs.fixes}
